subcodes.first_line: O prisoner in the gaol! Observe how, through God's bounty and the confirmations of the All-Merciful, thou hast attained unto such exalted heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر زندان ملاحظه فرما که بفضل یزدان و تایید رحمن در چه ایوانی قرار یافتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry
